--- Juliette Bryant juliettebryant@hotmail.com
wrote:

Hi Jeffrey
How are you? Looks like I'm going to be in LA for a
while! Met a really good
producer who has set me up with an agent and I start
auditions this week! So
exciting!!! I really wanted to seee you and will
hopefully be in NY somtime
soon. Let me know if you come to LA at all.
Hope you're well and having fun!!!
Lots of love
Juliette

From: "J. Epstein" jeeproject@yahoo.com
To: Juliette Bryant juliettebryant@hotmail.com
Subject: Re: Hi Jeffrey!!!
Date: Tue, 21 Feb 2006 15:22:36 -0800 (PST)

come see me late tomorrow ( wed ) or thurs
--- Juliette Bryant juliettebryant@hotmail.com
wrote:

Hi Jeffrey
How are you?
I'm not sure if you even use this email address
anymore but I wanted to say
hi and see how you're doing?

I'm actually in New York at the moment and would
love to see you if you're
about. I'll be here till about the middle of
March.

Anyway hope you're doing well and would love to
see

you- it's been a
while!!! So let me know if and when you'll be
here.

Lots of love
Juliette
